name: Neha Joshi
summary: Personalized 9-step study plan targeting 3 weak areas with progressive difficulty.

steps.description: Formula revision sheet for specified chapters
steps.reasoning: Revise key formulas for Rotational Mechanics before practice to ensure quick recall during problem-solving.
steps.message_to_student: Time to review the important formulas for Rotational Mechanics. Having these at your fingertips will help you solve problems faster.

steps.description: Targeted practice set for specific topics, no timer
steps.reasoning: Start with easier problems in Rotational Mechanics to build confidence. No timer to reduce pressure.
steps.message_to_student: Now let's practice Rotational Mechanics with some problems. Take your time — there's no timer. Focus on understanding each solution.

steps.description: Formula revision sheet for specified chapters
steps.reasoning: Revise key formulas for Electrostatics before practice to ensure quick recall during problem-solving.
steps.message_to_student: Time to review the important formulas for Electrostatics. Having these at your fingertips will help you solve problems faster.

steps.description: Targeted practice set for specific topics, no timer
steps.reasoning: Start with easier problems in Electrostatics to build confidence. No timer to reduce pressure.
steps.message_to_student: Now let's practice Electrostatics with some problems. Take your time — there's no timer. Focus on understanding each solution.

steps.description: Formula revision sheet for specified chapters
steps.reasoning: Revise key formulas for Probability before practice to ensure quick recall during problem-solving.
steps.message_to_student: Time to review the important formulas for Probability. Having these at your fingertips will help you solve problems faster.

steps.description: Targeted practice set for specific topics, no timer
steps.reasoning: Start with easier problems in Probability to build confidence. No timer to reduce pressure.
steps.message_to_student: Now let's practice Probability with some problems. Take your time — there's no timer. Focus on understanding each solution.

steps.reasoning: A structured 3-day revision plan covering all weak areas (Rotational Mechanics, Electrostatics, Probability) for systematic improvement.
steps.message_to_student: Here's a 3-day revision plan covering Rotational Mechanics, Electrostatics, Probability. Follow it daily for consistent improvement.

steps.description: Full timed mock test simulating exam conditions
steps.reasoning: A timed mock test to assess improvement on weak chapters under exam conditions.
steps.message_to_student: Time to test yourself! This timed mock will show how much you've improved on your weak areas. Treat it like a real exam.

steps.reasoning: End with a confidence-building speed race in Calculus — a strong area — to maintain motivation.
steps.message_to_student: Great work! Let's end with a fun challenge — race against a bot in Calculus, one of your strongest topics!
